name: POKER VR w/ Slots and Blackjack!

reviews.review_description: Blackjack is rigged. in poker people constantly go all in before the flop, if you call with a good hand they’ll still somehow make you lose. Slots aren’t even worth it as you don’t win enough to walk away with profit. Underage kids screaming and shouting slurs constantly. Game is catered to poker+ subscribers. Hand tracking is terrible and so are the avatars and customization as well. Nothing like seeing a dealer pull a 21 consecutively and in poker having AA loses to a 2 pair cuz the flop turn and river give nothing. Or someone magically ends up with a 3 of a kind on the river while you have a 2 pair.

developer_response.body: this person is complaining about the game being rigged yet the examples are everyone else winning but them lol. Tilting is real.

reviews.review_description:
The game itself is very buggy, home avatars are not compatible with ingame attachments, headwear doesn't work with ingame avatars (hair through the hat), the vr experience is so so. Picking up chips or cards are often hit and miss. What makes the game fun is the people, not the program itself.

For those who blame the game for losing, grow up. It's still gambling. You will lose. The game is certified RNG. If you lose you lose because of you and your bad luck. Take it or leave it.

I really love this game but i just wish there were a few thing not to the DEV'S BELOW.                       

i have two suggestions you guys should work on roulette that's my favorite casino game and you guys should also do a daily spin kinda like vegas infinite insted of card picks

Poker vr is a great game to play with all your friends and others. it has great graphics and cool designs to mess with. i still think that you should be able to make your own table without purchasing the poker_plus. they're outfits are well made, and also really cool. the players can get out of hand sometimes.

I absolutely love this game it's very interactive and has a great community i cant wait to see what they add next , my one complaint would either be the hand tracking issues (Could be on my end),or the opening tutorial for either black jack or poker. All in all amazing game

Poker vr  has a fantastic community of players! 

The game is improving all the time the devs are always working to make improvements and quick to fix bugs. 

There is lots of ways to build your bank roll from free tournaments to weekly challenge hands rewards for straight and royal flushes and the Weekly give away.

The new blackjack update is amazing people are loving it.

What a fantastic app that incorporates my two favourite things.. playing poker and chatting with new and interesting people from all around the globe. this is by far the best poker game in VR. there are plenty of opportunities to increase your chip stuck and multiple ways to spend the lot whilst having fun and friendly banter. Keep up the good work

This Poker game has one of the best communities I have ever experienced online.

 Most of the people are super nice and the gameplay is absolutely awesome with plenty of free tournaments and ways to earn chips without paying any money.

 Developers are always online and happy to help with any problems issues or any questions you may have and I must admit I have never played a game you can be so involved with the development and improvements of a game before.

I would highly recommend this game if you spend a lot of time at home the community absolutely amazing including PTSD sufferers and others which find great solace in this game.

Jump on board and get ready to play the best poker of your Life.

And they have just increased the prizes in all of the tournaments to unbelievable amount that are clearly within your grasp if you are a decent player.

Get this game today, you'll love it and thank me later 😄 heh.

Yeah this game can be amazing and all but there is only one downside.THERE IS ALMOST NO WAY TO GET MORE FREE CHIPS.And yes I know the daily and weekly rewards give you some,but they only give you enough to play a couple hands.But other than that,great game

Its fun and great talking with others... I have one slight complaint. I noticed that when you have been playing a while in blackjack the house gets blackjack  very often and wins without busting the majority of the time . I think it's to make you buy  chips . It is a business tho. Still fun game i like it

reviews.review_title: It’s not the worst but not the best
reviews.review_description: Overall the game is just too much going on needs to be how it was 2 years ago just poker and not crazy graphics my quest 2 can barley handle it and I’m not even under age and I’m getting suspend for having a higher pitched voice something that I can’t control the moderation is horrible and they don’t do anything about it so overall it’s just not a good Game

developer_response.body: This person is clearly underage and crashing out because they cant play.

reviews.review_description: I like this one better than any other poker or blackjack. Controls are easy. Community seems nice. But I will say the algorithm is a little house favored and probably costs them users rather than getting people to buy chips. Lots of free tourneys though. So you can build up, it’ll just take longer on this game. The community makes up for it though. Fun people on here.
this game is great you could hang out with friends you may get mad or happy sometimes but overall a fun game i would recommend you to install this game if you wanna test your luck
Assalot best game but the only thing is were you run out of chips so can you add more ways to get more thanks love the cummonity and love this game love it

reviews.review_title: Best poker.. and it just got better!
reviews.review_description: I've been playing this for awhile now. I took a small break and when I came back the game had really improved. You can tell the devs do care. Can't wait to be in inner circle!

reviews.review_title: Used to be a great game
reviews.review_description: Used to be a great game played for many years now it's got underage kids betting 10000+ on a flop on low tables with disgusting behaviour I will be deleting this game very shortly not good
If you’re into playing poker this is worth downloading. Very fun game, and highly recommend! Beware, it can become addicting. Also watch out for immature kids.
the game is really good but the modaration suck ive cussed a lot in the game but like 99% of them wasent towered players and i got my account susspened

I was not a huge fan when I first started playing this game ￼. There was a lot of things that needed to be fixed. I am happy to say that the people who run this game are actually working to make it better and it is getting better all the time. It’s now at a very good point still needs a little work, but I have faith they will be working at fixing these issues. ￼ The people that run this game actually listened to suggestions and seem to be fixing a lot of of the things people are telling them to. ￼ D￼edit tely the best poker game on Quest.
They do need to do something about their tournament points system, it’s pretty bad when you can play for an hour in five minutes and somebody can just join right at the end of the tournaments lockdown and play for 10 minutes and score a higher points than you. they also need to figure out table distribution of people in tournaments .￼

Nothing but good times every time I get on . Been awhile since I’ve played and the fact that they added blackjack is a great way to switch things up . Great community and amazing people . (If you find the right table)  HIGHLY RECOMMEND
Very fun lots of people who play. Slots are ok black jack is good and Texas holdem is amazing. Though I do with that there was better challenge pay outs but overall really fun
This is probably one of the best casino games that you can play it gives you 20K free chips when you first start and it's just a fun experience

reviews.review_title: Best poker in the freaking world
reviews.review_description: If this game owner sees this review, I would like for people or the owner to send me 4 million out of 7 million that I had because every time I would bet the dealer would get blackjack in the game and I just want my 4 million back because the dealer just kept getting black jack hopefully I can get my money back by the owner or someone generous ￼
This game is the best poker/black jack game I have ever played so you should try this game out
Been playing for the last week its rather addictive,  Only thing that spoils the free tournys are the kids going all in every hand

I have only had positive experiances with this game and now the game has has been enhanced even further with the addition of blackjack. The devs are always working hard to improve your experiance with updates to new outfits and gameplay. There is always weekly challanges, tournements and showdowns to give you the oppertunity to win poker/blackjack chips. All in all the best poker/blackjack game on vr
this is one of the best poker games i’ve played and everything is very organized.
I love the game I got the badge just waiting on the shirt still

This is the best poker game for VR that I've played. They give you an option to play while not havin to actually spend any real money, which is really surprising and always great to see. 10/10 I have a great time playing this
No matter how good your hand is opponents will get the exact cards they need

developer_response.body: Opponents will get the exact cards but you wont to win? Dont tilt, all our rng is proven random and we provide proof on our discord from time to time.

Poker VR is extremely fun and one of my favorite games ever. Ever since they added blackjack it’s gotten way better. PokerVR is on top.

reviews.review_description: People are friendly and easy to learn

I love poker and this game is always so much fun, it has its ups and downs but it’s still an amazing game because you get to meet new people, have fun, and bet like crazy and get more chips from the daily and weekly rewards. Overall best poker game.
Not going to lie I am only here for the inner circle but pokervr is a great, l love when I win a big bet.

It has its ups and downs. Really need to get ahold of the kids they let play. Also, many times I've been BB when that should never happen. Also, some of these hands do not be chopped. Other than those things, I love it. Since I can't play in real life as much as I used to, this is my go to.

reviews.review_title: Fun game but need faster support
reviews.review_description: Would give it 5 stars but it keeps banning mics for "underage" when you're not actually underage. Also support is extremely slow to undo it. Fun game tho.
If you love texas hold em/ blackjack this is the game great community and just overall fun I get lost in the game for hours
so fun but i keep on getting my mic muted
Because of u use hand gestures to play with and good quality with speaking and having a great time.
really fun game, gives you some tokens for free after you play for along time.
It has poker,black jack,and slots
This game is fun, thrilling and addicting but you can easily lose everything in one session. Self control is recommended.
This game is great!!

If you like poker then this game will not disappoint. It’s simple to use and for the most part , it has a great community. Great way to pass a few hours by in the evenings. Only complaint is that there should be a more in depth way of verifying age. Lots of little kids at the tables when you’re starting off on low stakes.
Love making new friends. Get together and talk to people all over the world great community place really enjoyable

I love this game and it has taught me so much about poker especially with the people you meet and what they know and can teach you. Also the poker hand ranking system and the camera are a great way to help beginners like I was. Just a overall well thought through game.
my friend showed me ts so fun

Absolutely love this game highly recommend. Not only is the game fun and relaxing and competitive you meet all kinds of people have only had one bad run in with a kid on here being weird but other than that absolutely amazing

I play poker seriously on small stakes and this game helps me practice. 

There's definitely some crazy players out there, so you just need to find a serious table. But overall it delivers great on a VR poker experience.
game

This poker game has a fantastic community of players!!

And the devs are updating the game so it can be more fun and they are working so hard so we can play the game that we love, also ￼poker and blackjack are fascinating games in poker vr, I just want to thanks the community and devs that make this game more fun.  ￼￼

I had a negative experience with this app. They allow underage kids to join and don’t moderate. The kids will curse unregulated and harass adults.  I have had the apps moderators join a table and let us know they don’t have enough people to manage the app. I have had chips disappear. I had not received chips for their special achievements Multiple times. This app sucks money and doesn’t do what they advertised. I joined their subscription and never received their monthly $300k. I left tables and see my balance less than what I left the table with. I’ve seen pot wins go into your bank roll way less than what it should be. I’ve met moderators and they claim they don’t have enough management. They never honored payouts for me. Go elsewhere.  This app feeds off gamblers and doesn’t hold up their end. They only reposition discord every other week. Firestorm didn’t want to hear anyone’s issues.

This is a very good game just in general while yes some people take it spuriously and yell and stuff some and most people will help u out if u dont know how to play. Also the new blackjack update definitely brought people in and if there are any devs looking at this add different games like craps. So yea good game 👍👍
Good game fun

Great game I love this so much. For the strategic and people who feel lucky this is the best game right now. I love the community and the hourly tournaments ranging from free to play to late night 10k’s game game for all the development and has some great potential. With the devs adding blackjack we could see more games coming and a lot more fun for the game. Their are some bugs for the game though like the big menu to select your table being super far down and way too big some times to the point where you can select it is a easy fix though all you have to do is back out and rejoin. Other then that this is a great game and love playing definitely recommend it!!
